blue_oceans.notes: 436K cold shower/cold exposure community. Wim Hof covers breathing, Streaks is generic. No app specifically gamifies the daily cold shower habit with streak/XP/temperature logging and community challenges.

1.09M sleep community. All apps track sleep quality or deliver sleep content. No app gamifies the daily BEDTIME ROUTINE habit (phone down by X, no caffeine after Y, same bed/wake time) with streak/XP mechanics.
1.41M golf community. All apps track rounds or book tee times. No app gamifies the daily practice habit (putting drills, chipping reps, range sessions) with streak/XP for golfers.

982K tennis community. Clash is a game, SwingVision tracks matches, PlayYourCourt books lessons. Zero apps gamify the daily PRACTICE habit (serving drills, footwork, ball machine) with streak/XP for tennis players.

2.28M martial arts community (BJJ, MMA, general MA). All apps are instructional videos or school management. No app gamifies the daily training habit (drilling, sparring, conditioning) with streak/XP for martial artists.

1.07M Excel/spreadsheet community. All apps are the software itself or passive learning content. No app gamifies daily Excel skill practice (one formula, one pivot table, one macro) with streak/XP and beginner-to-expert leveling.

370K negotiation/sales community. Reference apps and CRMs dominate. No app gamifies the daily negotiation skill practice (scenario roleplay, tactic drills) with streak/XP and real-world challenge logging.

510K leadership/management community. BetterUp is expensive B2B coaching. No app gamifies daily leadership skill practice (giving feedback, running 1:1s, decision frameworks) with streak/XP for aspiring managers.
248K sign language community. Apps are dictionaries and phrase reference tools. No app gamifies daily ASL practice habit with streak/XP/leveling — Duolingo has no ASL course, leaving a clear gap.

soft_competition.notes: 989K breathwork/meditation community. Wim Hof, Othership, and Breathwrk all have partial streak features. Gap: none combine full streak gamification (XP, levels, achievement badges) with multi-technique breathwork across a broad community.
890K flexibility/yoga community. StretchIt and Down Dog have session tracking. Gap: no app built purely around daily stretching HABIT with streak/XP/level-up and time-based consistency rewards.
2.5M cycling community. Strava has real streak features and large user base. Gap: Strava is broad fitness — no cycling-specific daily habit streak app with XP for consistency, not just ride logging.

92K Esperanto community. Duolingo has an Esperanto course but the learner base is tiny and engagement low. Clozemaster covers it lightly. Gap: dedicated Esperanto habit streak app built for the serious conlang learner community.

occupied.notes: 380K Arabic learning community. Duolingo has Arabic with full streak system at 5.6M users. Rosetta Stone, Pimsleur, Mango all cover Arabic with streaks. Fully occupied — skip.
